description: 4 ranking modes. Each mode defines a weight vector over the 12 factors. Weights within a mode sum to 100. A project's final score for a mode is sum(factor_score * mode_weight) / 100, producing a 1.0-5.0 value that is then rescaled to 0-100 percent.

balanced.name: Balanced
balanced.description: General-purpose ranking. Default. Best when you do not have a strong life-stage constraint.

cashflow.name: Cashflow
cashflow.description: Optimizes for the fastest first paid euro. Best when you need validation revenue as soon as possible.

learning.name: Learning
learning.description: Optimizes for skill acquisition and portfolio growth. Best when you are building skills for a career pivot or want to stretch into unfamiliar stacks.
learning._notes: technical_fit_inverted and asset_leverage_inverted are computed as (6 - factor_score). This pushes scoring toward projects that require NEW skills and DON'T reuse existing assets, because the point is to grow.

moat.name: Moat
moat.description: Optimizes for long-term defensibility. Best when you want to build a single defensible business rather than a portfolio.
